title: Add World Weaver to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [World Weaver](https://github.com/MrMegnis/world-generator) to build
- Generate worlds with AI using GPT-5.4, render scenes with gpt-image-2, and create videos with ltx-2 via pollinations.ai unified API.

Fixes #11911

gist.headline: Weaving new worlds
gist.blurb: World Weaver just landed in the Greenhouse! Generate entire worlds, render scenes, and create videos using our unified API.
gist.summary: Added World Weaver to the community apps list, a tool that generates worlds, renders scenes, and creates videos using GPT-5.4, gpt-image-2, and ltx-2 via the unified API.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover World Weaver in the Greenhouse and use it to build complete AI-generated environments with text, image, and video models.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'World Weaver', an app that generates worlds, scenes, and videos. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee weaving a tiny glowing digital globe or landscape using a small loom, surrounded by screens showing generated environments.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot using a tiny wooden loom to weave a glowing digital globe. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a lush generated landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and magical.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot using a tiny wooden loom to weave a glowing digital globe. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a lush generated landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and magical.
